retrospective.headline: Planning gate requires human approval. PM_SIGNOFF.md is set to Approved: NO — a human must review SYSTEM_SPEC.md, ROADMAP.md, and command-surface.md, then flip to Approved: YES to open the gate and transition to implementation phase.

recent_decisions.statement: V1 is scoped to the discovery-manifest-compile-serve pipeline for 3 Node.js frameworks only. All 12 vision domains are deferred to V2+.
MCP serve is describe-only in V1 — no live API proxying.
Capability grouping starts as 1:1 route-to-capability mapping. Intelligent grouping deferred.
No plugin API in V1. Framework support is hardcoded for Express, Fastify, NestJS.
TypeScript/JavaScript ecosystem only in V1. Python, Go, Java are V2+.

recent_accepted_turns.summary: Filled all planning artifacts with concrete V1 scope: CLI tool scanning Express/Fastify/NestJS codebases, producing capability manifests, compiling tools, and serving via local MCP. Awaiting human approval to open planning gate.

blocked_reason: human:Planning gate requires human approval. Review .planning/PM_SIGNOFF.md, .planning/SYSTEM_SPEC.md, and .planning/ROADMAP.md, then set 'Approved: YES' in PM_SIGNOFF.md to unlock the implementation phase.

recent_decisions.statement: TypeScript/JavaScript ecosystem only in V1. Python, Go, Java are V2+.
tusq review is non-interactive in V1 — prints summary to stdout only. Users approve capabilities by editing tusq.manifest.json directly. Interactive TUI deferred to V1.1.
tusq manifest requires an explicit prior tusq scan — no implicit scan fallback in V1.
Scan data persists to .tusq/scan.json as an internal file contract between tusq scan and tusq manifest.

recent_accepted_turns.summary: Filled all planning artifacts with concrete V1 scope: CLI tool scanning Express/Fastify/NestJS codebases, producing capability manifests, compiling tools, and serving via local MCP. Awaiting human approval to open planning gate.

Fixed 4 contradictions in planning artifacts: tusq review is non-interactive (not interactive TUI), manifest requires explicit prior scan (no implicit scan), approval mechanism documented (manual JSON edit), and added missing error case for no scan data.
Fixed scan data persistence gap (added .tusq/scan.json file contract) and clarified --format json on scan. All planning artifacts are internally consistent and ready for human signoff.
